title: Customize Default Emoji Response Bar
excerpt: When reacting to or "liking"an update/ comment, the emoji bar default shows: thumbs up, clapping, high five, red heart, smiling face, and a green checkmark. I would like the ability to customize what emojis appear there …

posts.author: jaylen.barrett (jaylen.barrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
When reacting to or "liking"an update/ comment, the emoji bar default shows: thumbs up, clapping, high five, red heart, smiling face, and a green checkmark. I would like the ability to customize what emojis appear there to be more helpful for my needs.

Slack has a similar feature for reference [Preferences > Messages and Media > Show one-click reactions on messages > Custom]
